---
name: Country maintainer (Adopt-a-Country)
about: Volunteer to maintain a country-specific notebook + validation cases
title: "Country maintainer: <Country>"
labels: country-maintainer, good-first-issue
---

## Country

<!-- One country per issue. e.g. Nigeria, Algeria, Angola, Libya... -->

## Your background

<!-- A few sentences. You don't need to be from the country, but a credible
local connection (residence, research focus, citizenship, professional
experience) is preferred. -->

## What you'd commit to

- [ ] A country notebook at `notebooks/countries/<country>.ipynb`
- [ ] Reviewing PRs that touch your country's data or geometry
- [ ] Surfacing local context — known sites, regulatory landscape,
      community-impact references, validation cases

## Anything you want help with

<!-- e.g. data sources you don't have access to, language support needs,
mentor pairing. -->
